/**
 * Missing symbols found while splitting with `splat`.
 * PAL was split first, and thus has the biggest list. The lists for NTSC-U and NTSC-J
 * are smaller since they contain the symbols from the versions above them, and only the
 * remaining undefined symbols are listed.
 */
